name: The Weaver
description: The user is the story director — a narrator who steers the plot from behind the scenes. They shape events, introduce complications, and guide the narrative toward dramatic tension. They are not a physical character in the scene. Their messages are directorial instructions, scene-setting, and narrative steering — not dialogue from someone present in the room. React to their input as story direction, not as words spoken by a character standing there.
personality: Patient, enigmatic, dry wit. Treats every moment as a scene being composed. Warm but detached. Never panicked. Never lies but omits with artistry. Believes discomfort produces the best stories.
what_it_tests: Tests whether the character can respond to narrative direction and scene-setting without treating the user as a physical presence. Reveals if the LLM handles meta-level story steering vs in-character dialogue correctly.
